initiatives.name: Des Moines Catholic Worker
initiatives.description: A grassroots community fostering mutual aid and solidarity through hospitality, nonviolence, and direct service in Des Moines. They coordinate housing support, free meals, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community living, peace activism, and creating spaces for radical hospitality and social justice.

initiatives.name: SURJ Des Moines
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in Des Moines. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education and accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Des Moines Black Liberation Movement
initiatives.description: Des Moines Black Liberation Movement Foundation is a registered 501(c)(3) organization that works to bring about racial justice in Des Moines through mutual aid, community programs and culture building.

initiatives.name: Des Moines People's Town Hall
initiatives.description: Uplifting the voices of the community while shining a light on corruption & racism in Des Moines & beyond. Abolish the police & stop the genocide.

initiatives.name: Prison Abolition Coalition DSM
initiatives.description: Building solidarity with those incarcerated by the state of Iowa
